title: Publications | Stats NZ
content:
## New Zealand cohort life tables: March 2026 update
Cohort life tables track the mortality experience of people born in each year from 1876.

## How long will I live?
Get an indication of the age you’re likely to live to.

## International migration: January 2026
International migration statistics give the latest outcomes-based measure of migration, which includes estimates of migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.

## International travel: January 2026
International travel covers the number and characteristics of overseas visitors and New Zealand resident travellers (short-term movements) entering or leaving New Zealand.

## Births to under-25s decline to record low proportion
The proportion of births to mothers aged under 25 years in 2025 reached a record low of 1 in 7 births, half of what it was a generation ago.

## Births and deaths: Year ended December 2025 (including abridged period life table)
Births and deaths releases provide statistics on the number of births and deaths of people resident in New Zealand that are registered during a given period, along with selected fertility and mortality rates. They may differ from statistics presented elsewhere that relate to all births and deaths registered in New Zealand or to births and deaths occurring during a given period.

## National population estimates: At 31 December 2025
National population estimates give the best available measure of the population, by age and sex, usually living in Aotearoa New Zealand.

## International travel: December 2025
International travel covers the number and characteristics of overseas visitors and New Zealand resident travellers (short-term movements) entering or leaving New Zealand.

## Net migration gain of 14,200
New Zealand had a net migration gain of 14,200 in 2025, down from a net gain of 23,800 in 2024.

## Visitor arrivals pass 3.5 million
Overseas visitor arrivals to New Zealand totalled 3.51 million in the December 2025 year, up 195,600 (6 percent) from the December 2024 year.

## International migration: December 2025
International migration statistics give the latest outcomes-based measure of migration, which includes estimates of migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.

## About the transition from the Household Economic Survey to the Household Income and Living Survey
Read about key differences between the Household Income and Living Survey, and the survey that it replaces, the Household Economic Survey.
